title: PF2e Flatfinder

recommends.reason: Used for the safest possible wrapping of the Elite/Weak level adjustment.
Flattens NPC/PC proficiency bonuses to match the Flatfinder math.
Competence and encounter badges are styled to blend with Dorako UI themes.

description: A compendium of replacements for Feats, Actions and Activities to streamline running Flatfinder on Foundry, plus automation for Competence-check result badges, Incapacitation adjustment, Flatfinder Elite/Weak templates, the Apex (solo boss) extra-turn template, and a Flatfinder encounter XP/difficulty badge in the combat tracker. Badges follow the GL Universe Etched Glass design language. To be used with the Pathfinder 2e system and the Proficiency without Level variant enabled.
